goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { fs_from_list[T](k0) = s and k0.is_unique }
proof: exists(k0: List[T]) { fs_from_list[T](k0) = s and k0.is_unique }

goal: fs_from_list[T](items) = s and items.is_unique and family = finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](items, k)
exists(k0: List[T]) { fs_from_list[T](k0) = s and k0.is_unique and family = finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](k0, k) }
proof: function(x0: List[T]) { not (fs_from_list[T](x0) = s and x0.is_unique and finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](x0, k) = family) }(items)

goal: exists(k0: FiniteSet[FiniteSet[T]]) { exists(k1: List[T]) { fs_from_list[T](k1) = s and k1.is_unique and k0 = finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](k1, k) } }
proof: let w0: List[T] satisfy { fs_from_list[T](w0) = s and w0.is_unique and finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](w0, k) = family }
function(x0: FiniteSet[FiniteSet[T]]) { not exists(k0: List[T]) { fs_from_list[T](k0) = s and k0.is_unique and finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](k0, k) = x0 } }(family)

goal: exists(k0: FiniteSet[FiniteSet[T]]) { exists(k1: List[T]) { fs_from_list[T](k1) = s and k1.is_unique and k0 = finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](k1, k) } }
proof: exists(k0: FiniteSet[FiniteSet[T]], k1: List[T]) { fs_from_list[T](k1) = s and k1.is_unique and finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](k1, k) = k0 }

goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { fs_from_list[T](k0) = s and k0.is_unique and finite_k_subsets[T](s, k) = finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](k0, k) }
proof: function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: Nat) { exists(k0: List[T0]) { fs_from_list[T0](k0) = x0 and k0.is_unique and finite_k_subsets[T0](x0, x1) = finite_k_subsets_from_list[T0](k0, x1) } }[T](s, k)

let w0[T0](arg0: FiniteSet[T0], arg1: Nat) -> w0_result: List[T0] satisfy { fs_from_list[T0](w0_result) = arg0 and w0_result.is_unique and finite_k_subsets[T0](arg0, arg1) = finite_k_subsets_from_list[T0](w0_result, arg1) }
(t ⊆ FiniteSet.from_list[T](items) and t.cardinality_is(k)) != t ∈ finite_k_subsets[T](s, k)
(t ⊆ FiniteSet.from_list[T](items) and t.cardinality_is(k)) = t ∈ finite_k_subsets[T](s, k)
let w0: FiniteSet[T] satisfy { (w0 ⊆ s and w0.cardinality_is(k)) != w0 ∈ finite_k_subsets[T](s, k) }
function(x0: FiniteSet[T]) { x0 ∈ finite_k_subsets[T](s, k) = (x0 ⊆ s and x0.cardinality_is(k)) }(w0)
function(x0: FiniteSet[T]) { x0 ∈ finite_k_subsets[T](s, k) = (x0 ⊆ s and x0.cardinality_is(k)) }(t)
(t ⊆ FiniteSet.from_list[T](items) and t.cardinality_is(k)) != t ∈ finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](items, k)
(t ⊆ s and t.cardinality_is(k)) != t ∈ finite_k_subsets[T](s, k)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[FiniteSet[T]](finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](items, k), t)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[FiniteSet[T]](finite_k_subsets[T](s, k), t)
t ∈ finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](items, k).underlying_set != t ∈ finite_k_subsets[T](s, k)
t ∈ finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](items, k).underlying_set = t ∈ finite_k_subsets[T](s, k)
function(x0: FiniteSet[T]) { x0 ∈ finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](items, k).underlying_set = x0 ∈ finite_k_subsets[T](s, k).underlying_set }(t)
let w0: FiniteSet[T] satisfy { w0 ∈ finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](items, k).underlying_set != w0 ∈ finite_k_subsets[T](s, k).underlying_set }
function(x0: FiniteSet[T]) { x0 ∈ finite_k_subsets_from_list[T](items, k).underlying_set = x0 ∈ finite_k_subsets[T](s, k).underlying_set }(w0)
let w0: List[T] satisfy { fs_from_list[T](w0) = s and w0.is_unique and not finite_k_subsets[T](s, k).cardinality_is(list_k_subsets[T](w0, k).length) }
function(x0: List[T]) { not x0.is_unique or fs_from_list[T](x0) != s or finite_k_subsets[T](s, k).cardinality_is(list_k_subsets[T](x0, k).length) }(w0)
